pages.text: Better Horses smooths out the rough edges of mounted travel.$(br2)$(li)Two players can ride the same horse for co-op trips.$(li)The first rider keeps the reins, $(li)The second rider gets a steady back seat.

pages.title: Let the Horse Cruise
pages.text: Double tap $(item)W$() while riding to enable auto-ride. Once it kicks in, the horse keeps moving forward and you just handle the steering.$(br2)Tap a movement key again when you want the full reins back in your hands.

pages.title: Mud, Water, and Leaves
pages.text: Horses no longer behave like they are made of stone in bad terrain.$(br2)$(li)They float instead of sinking in water.$(li)They move faster while crossing water.$(li)Leaf blocks lose collision while you are riding, so forests feel more like a path and less like an argument.
